creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: crees
Date: Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012
New Revision: 309465
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309465

Log:
  FrontAccounting is a simple, but powerful, system for the
  entire ERP chain and covers:
  
  Purchase Orders
  Goods Receivable Notes
  Supplier Invoices/Credit Notes
  Payments
  Allocations
  Accounts Payable
  Items and Inventory
  Stock
  Manufacturing
  Sales Orders
  Customer Invoices/Credit Notes
  Deposits
  Allocations
  Accounts Receivable
  Among many others...
  
  FrontAccounting is free and released under the GNU General
  Public License.
  
  WWW: http://www.frontaccounting.com/
  
  PR:		ports/174601
  Submitted by:	Janky Jay <ek@purplehat.org>

Added:
  head/finance/frontaccounting/
  head/finance/frontaccounting/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/files/
  head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-deinstall.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-install.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-message.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/frontaccounting/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Mon Dec 24 16:25:01 2012	(r309464)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@
     SUBDIR += eqonomize-kde3
     SUBDIR += eqonomize-kde4
     SUBDIR += expense
+    SUBDIR += frontaccounting
     SUBDIR += gnofin
     SUBDIR += gnucash
     SUBDIR += gnucash-docs

Added: head/finance/frontaccounting/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/Makefile	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+# Created by: Janky Jay <ek@purplehat.org>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	frontaccounting
+DISTVERSION=	2.3.13
+CATEGORIES=	finance www
+MASTER_SITES=	SF
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	frontaccounting/FrontAccounting-2.3/${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	ek@purplehat.org
+COMMENT=	Simple, powerful system for the entire ERP chain
+
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+USE_MYSQL=	yes
+USE_PHP+=	mysql mysqli openssl session
+
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+
+NO_BUILD=	yes
+
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-install pkg-deinstall pkg-message
+PORTDOCS=	*
+
+SHAREOWN=	${WWWOWN}
+SHAREGRP=	${WWWGRP}
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	APACHE LIGHTTPD MYSQL
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	APACHE MYSQL
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MAPACHE}
+USE_APACHE_RUN=	22+
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLIGHTTPD}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	lighttpd:${PORTSDIR}/www/lighttpd
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	mysqld_safe:${PORTSDIR}/databases/mysql55-server
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+PORTDOCSARGS=
+.else
+PORTDOCSARGS=	'-not -path "./docs*"'
+.endif
+
+do-install:
+	@${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${WWWDIR} ${PORTDOCSARGS}
+
+post-install:
+	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/distinfo	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (frontaccounting-2.3.13.tar.gz) = cff92915eb6a369520d176b8af8d7d3bcab47037aa66ad8d895cf8b7214ce286
+SIZE (frontaccounting-2.3.13.tar.gz) = 1254437

Added: head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-deinstall.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-deinstall.in	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+FAWEB=%%WWWDIR%%
+
+case $2 in
+POST-DEINSTALL)
+    if [ -e ${FAWEB} ]; then
+		echo ""
+		echo "If you do not plan on re-installing this port, "
+		echo "you should manually remove the \"${FAWEB}\" directory."
+		echo ""
+    fi
+    ;;
+*)
+    ;;
+esac

Added: head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-install.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-install.in	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+# Works around a deficiency in pkg_install; directory ownerships
+# are not preserved.  This should be removed when ports-mgmt/pkg rules
+# the Ports Tree.
+
+FAWEB=%%WWWDIR%%
+WWWOWN=%%WWWOWN%%
+WWWGRP=%%WWWGRP%%
+CHOWN=%%CHOWN%%
+
+case $2 in
+POST-INSTALL)
+	if [ -e ${FAWEB} ]; then
+		${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${FAWEB}
+	fi
+	;;
+*)
+	;;
+esac

Added: head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-message.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/files/pkg-message.in	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+ *******************************************************************
+
+ FrontAccounting has been installed into the following directory:
+ %%WWWDIR%%
+
+ Be sure to adjust your web server's configuration to allow you to
+ access that directory.
+
+ *******************************************************************

+++ head/finance/frontaccounting/pkg-descr	Mon Dec 24 21:49:21 2012	(r309465)
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+FrontAccounting is a simple, but powerful, system for the 
+entire ERP chain and covers:

+Purchase Orders

+Supplier Invoices/Credit Notes
+Payments
+Allocations
+Accounts Payable
+Items and Inventory
+Stock
+Manufacturing
+Sales Orders
+Customer Invoices/Credit Notes

+Allocations
+Accounts Receivable
+Among many others...

+FrontAccounting is free and released under the GNU General 
+Public License.
+
+WWW: http://www.frontaccounting.com/
